```shell
  @ val secret = client.keys.secret.generate_signing_key("my-party-key", SigningKeyUsage.NamespaceOnly)
      secret : SigningPublicKey = SigningPublicKey(
        id = 1220eaade65a...,
        format = DER-encoded X.509 SubjectPublicKeyInfo,
        keySpec = EC-Curve25519,
        usage = namespace
      )
```
